title: psychotria humilis var. cornuta
intro: Psychotria humilis var. cornuta, also known as the Dwarf Wild Coffee or Wild Coffee, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of various alkaloids and phenolic compounds. The plant has been reported to have potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Psychotria humilis var. cornuta are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
